cards.front: What is the primary function of Operational Support Systems?
cards.back: To execute tasks and provide real-time information to support daily operations

cards.front: What is the primary function of Decision-Support Systems?
cards.back: To provide data-driven insights to support informed business decisions

cards.front: What is the main difference between Operational and Decision-Support Systems?
cards.back: Operational Systems focus on execution, while Decision-Support Systems focus on analysis and strategic decision-making

cards.front: When should Operational Support Systems be used?
cards.back: When a task needs to be performed quickly and efficiently, such as customer service or inventory management

cards.front: When should Decision-Support Systems be used?
cards.back: When a business needs to analyze data and make strategic decisions, such as forecasting sales or identifying new markets
